channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Police investigate death of man who fell from Manchester city centre hotel
item.description: A man has died after falling from a building in Manchester city centre on Saturday afternoon, prompting an ongoing police investigation. Emergency services were called to Charles Street at around 4pm ...

item.title: Police search Clayton Park area of Halifax for missing newborn; four people in custody
item.description: Halifax Regional Police are conducting an active search in the Clayton Park neighbourhood of Halifax for a missing newborn baby. The operation began after authorities were notified on Friday evening o...

item.title: Human Responsibility and Environmental Stewardship in God’s Creation
item.description: The opinion article discusses how the natural world reflects God’s deliberate and purposeful design. According to the writer, every part of creation, including the sun, rivers, trees, animals, and hum...

item.title: Review of ‘Chand Mera Dil’: A troubled romance of young love, responsibility, and emotional imbalance
item.description: Vivek Soni’s film ‘Chand Mera Dil’ stars Lakshya and Ananya Panday as Aarav and Chandni, two engineering students who fall deeply in love at the age of 21. Their intense relationship quickly turns com...

item.title: How body neutrality helped the author overcome a lifetime of shame related to body size
item.description: In this personal essay, Jasper Peach reflects on growing up in the 1980s with a larger body and the societal shame attached to it. From childhood experiences of bullying to well-meaning but damaging c...

item.title: Prior Mental Health Concerns and Extremist Online Radicalization Preceded Deadly San Diego Mosque Shooting
item.description: A Los Angeles Times investigation revealed that Caleb Liam Vazquez, one of the gunmen responsible for the deadly shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego, had previously attracted police attention ...

item.title: Pauline Lopez appointed as coach for Ateneo taekwondo team
item.description: Filipina taekwondo athlete Pauline Lopez has officially joined the coaching staff of the Ateneo de Manila University taekwondo team, marking a significant return to the school community. The developme...

item.title: Report highlights mental health challenges facing boys in South Africa and calls for early intervention
item.description: The Status of Boys in South Africa Report has drawn renewed attention to the mental health struggles faced by young males, urging a shift in how society, schools, and communities respond to emotional ...

item.title: Zendaya discusses working relationship with Tom Holland amid ongoing marriage speculation
item.description: Zendaya recently opened up about her experience working alongside Tom Holland while addressing ongoing public speculation about their personal lives, particularly rumours regarding marriage. In the fe...

item.title: Jim Acosta critiques political use of presidential cognitive tests after taking MoCA exam
item.description: Former CNN reporter Jim Acosta, a frequent critic of Donald Trump, participated in a televised demonstration of the Montreal Cognitive Assessment (MoCA) on his show, administered by Dr. Rob Davidson o...

item.title: US, Iran and regional allies reportedly near agreement to maintain ceasefire and reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US President Donald Trump has claimed that a major agreement aimed at ending the conflict with Iran is close to being finalised, following intense diplomatic discussions involving the United States, I...

item.title: Halifax police and search teams look for missing newborn after medical emergency involving woman
item.description: Police in Halifax, Nova Scotia, are conducting an urgent search for a missing newborn baby following a serious medical incident involving a woman believed to have recently given birth. Halifax Regiona...

item.title: Reviving Monthly Environmental Sanitation for Cleaner Nigerian Cities
item.description: The article discusses the urgent need to bring back monthly environmental sanitation in Nigeria as a practical solution to worsening environmental and public health challenges. It recalls how, in earl...

item.title: National Audit Office Report Highlights Elevated Risks to Taxpayers from Sizewell C Nuclear Project Financing
item.description: The UK’s National Audit Office (NAO) has released a critical report on the financing of the Sizewell C nuclear power station in Suffolk. The project, which aims to generate 3.2GW of electricity, recei...

item.title: Capitol Police officer Daniel Hodges criticizes GOP lawmaker’s claims that January 6 riot was staged
item.description: Former Washington, D.C. Metropolitan Police Officer Daniel Hodges, who became widely known after being injured while defending the U.S. Capitol during the January 6, 2021 attack, publicly condemned re...

item.title: Tanzania’s DCEA destroys over 500kg of seized heroin in Mtwara anti-drug operation
item.description: Tanzanian authorities under the Drug Control and Enforcement Authority (DCEA) have successfully destroyed 504 kilograms of heroin in the Mtwara region as part of ongoing efforts to fight drug traffick...

item.title: BTS Suga participates in 12K marathon ahead of California 'Arirang' concert
item.description: BTS member Suga, also known as Min Yoongi, made headlines after reportedly taking part in a 12-kilometre marathon in California shortly before his scheduled appearance at the ‘Arirang’ concert. Accord...

item.title: Tinubu Emerges APC Presidential Candidate, Set to Receive Certificate on Sunday
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has emerged as the presidential candidate of the All Progressives Congress (APC) following the party’s presidential primary exercise ahead of the 2027 general elections. Accordin...

item.title: Court orders Sipho Ngwenya to repay R30 million to Ingonyama Trust after failed appeal
item.description: Former Ingonyama Trust Board chairperson Sipho Ngwenya has been ordered by the Pietermaritzburg High Court to repay R30 million to the Ingonyama Trust following a legal dispute over the transfer of fu...

item.title: Police identify suspect in Mississauga fatal stabbing investigation
item.description: Peel Regional Police have identified a suspect in connection with a fatal stabbing that occurred in Mississauga. The investigation centres on a violent incident that resulted in the death of a woman, ...
